team_name: AdeshX: From Judgments to Just-in-Time Government Action
summary: Build an AI system to convert court judgment PDFs into actionable plans, ensuring human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
optimization_claims: Saves time spent on reading long documents
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
